name: order_pending_customer
body: Hello {{customer_name}}, we have received your order {{order_id}} for {{package_contents}}. Total: ₦{{total}}. We will confirm shortly.

name: order_confirmed_customer
body: Hello {{customer_name}}, your order {{order_id}} has been confirmed! Your package ({{package_contents}}) is being prepared. Total: ₦{{total}}.

name: order_assigned_customer
body: Hello {{customer_name}}, your order {{order_id}} has been assigned to {{da_name}} for delivery. Expected delivery: {{delivery_date}}.

name: order_assigned_da
body: Hello {{da_name}}, you have a new delivery assignment. Order: {{order_id}}. Customer: {{customer_name}}. Package: {{package_contents}}. Delivery date: {{delivery_date}}.

name: order_delivered_customer
body: Hello {{customer_name}}, your order {{order_id}} has been delivered! We hope you love your {{package_contents}}. Template content TBD.

name: order_paid_customer
body: Hello {{customer_name}}, payment of ₦{{payment_amount}} for order {{order_id}} has been received. Thank you!

name: Ladder1-Customer
body: Hi {{customer_name}}! 🎉 Great news — your {{package_contents}} order ({{order_id}}) has been confirmed and is being prepared for delivery. We're excited to get this to you! Stay tuned for updates.

name: Ladder2-Customer
body: Hi {{customer_name}}! 🚀 Your {{package_contents}} is getting ready to head your way. Our delivery rider is preparing to bring your order ({{order_id}}) to you. You're going to love it!

name: Ladder3-Customer
body: Hi {{customer_name}}! 📦 Your {{package_contents}} ({{order_id}}) is on its way and will arrive today! Please ensure someone is available to receive it. Amount to pay on delivery: ₦{{total}}. Thank you for choosing VitalVida!

name: Education1-Customer
body:
Hi {{customer_name}}! 🎉 Your {{package_contents}} has been delivered — welcome to the VitalVida family!

Here's your first tip to get the best results: apply consistently every day for at least 4 weeks. Consistency is everything!

Any questions? We're always here. 💚

name: Education2-Customer
body:
Hi {{customer_name}}! 👋 It's Day 3 of your hair journey!

Here's how to get maximum results from your {{package_contents}}:
✅ Apply to damp hair for better absorption
✅ Massage gently into scalp for 2-3 minutes
✅ Leave on for at least 30 minutes before rinsing

Keep going — you're on the right track! 💪

name: Education3-Customer
body:
Hi {{customer_name}}! 🚨 Day 5 check-in!

Avoid these common mistakes that slow down results:
❌ Applying to dirty hair — always wash first
❌ Using too much heat — let your hair breathe
❌ Skipping days — consistency is key!

You've got this — results are coming! 🌱

name: Education4-Customer
body:
Hi {{customer_name}}! 🌟 You're 9 days in — amazing!

By now you should be noticing:
✨ Less breakage when combing
✨ Hair feeling softer and stronger
✨ Scalp feeling healthier

If you haven't seen results yet — don't worry! Some people see changes at Week 3. Keep going! 💚

name: Education5-Customer
body:
Hi {{customer_name}}! 🏆 Day 15 — you're almost there!

Pro tips for even better results:
💡 Combine with a good diet — protein and water make a huge difference
💡 Protect your hair at night with a satin bonnet
💡 Trim split ends monthly to let healthy hair grow

Customers who reach Day 15 consistently see the best results. You're doing great! 🌺

name: Education6-Customer
body:
Hi {{customer_name}}! 🎊 Day 21 — you completed your first journey!

The best results come from continued use. Most customers see a full transformation by Month 2 and 3.

Ready for your next pack? Reply YES and we'll get your order sorted immediately — same product, same great results. 🛒

Thank you for trusting VitalVida! 💚

name: TelesalesAssigned-Telesales
Paid-Owner
PaymentFlagged-Owner
PaymentUnmatched-Owner
StockVarianceAlert
body: Stock variance detected for DA {delivery_agent_name}. Product: {product}. System: {system_stock}, Counted: {counted_stock}, Variance: {variance_percent:.1f}%. Status: {variance_status}.

name: DAWarehouseFrozen
body: WAREHOUSE FROZEN — DA {delivery_agent_name} warehouse frozen for {product}. Reason: {freeze_reason}. All assignments and dispatches blocked.

name: DAWarehouseUnfrozen
body: Warehouse unfrozen — DA {delivery_agent_name} warehouse for {product} cleared by {unfrozen_by}. Assignments and dispatches resumed.

name: FridayStockCountReminder
body: VitalVida Stock Count — Please take a clear photo of all your stock and submit your Friday count before 12:00 noon today. Log in at {system_url} to submit.

name: StockCountMissed
body: MISSED COUNT — DA {delivery_agent_name} did not submit Friday stock count by 12:00 noon. Warehouse auto-frozen. Review required.

name: StockCountDisputed
body: DISPUTED COUNT — DA {delivery_agent_name} reported {da_counted_quantity} units but Manager counted {manager_counted_quantity} units for {product}. Manual resolution required.

name: ConsignmentConfirmationRequired
body: Stock delivery recorded for {product}. Please confirm your received quantities within 24 hours.

name: ConsignmentDiscrepancy
body: DISCREPANCY — DA {delivery_agent_name} received {qty_received} of {product} but {qty_sent} were dispatched. Review required.

name: ConsignmentConfirmationOverdue
body: OVERDUE — DA {delivery_agent_name} has not confirmed their consignment after 24 hours.

name: ProofDemandExpired
body: PROOF EXPIRED — DA {delivery_agent_name} did not submit {proof_type} by the deadline. 1 strike added.

name: UnauthorizedPaid
body: UNAUTHORIZED PAID — Order {name} was set to Paid by {unauthorized_user} (role: {unauthorized_roles}). This user is not Finance. Please review immediately.

name: WhaleSLABreach
body: SLA BREACH — {tier} order {name} for {customer_name} (₦{total_payable}) has been Pending for over {sla_hours} hours. Immediate action required.
